pilot_tasks.pilot_description: Quick alignment probe: Run 1 fixed WD (5e-4) ResNet20/CIFAR-10 for 20 epochs. Compute delta_hat_t at epochs 5, 10, 15, 20 using both B=128 and B=8192. Verify alignment computation works and shows non-trivial variation.
pilot_tasks.pilot_pass_criteria: delta_hat_t is computable (no NaN), varies across epochs (std > 0.01), and mini-batch vs large-batch Pearson r > 0.5 at 20 epochs
pilot_tasks.fail_action: Check alignment computation code for bugs. If correct, increase EMA beta to 0.999. If still no signal, abort cand_aadwd and pivot to cand_empirical.

pilot_tasks.pilot_description: Sanity check: Run No-WD + 2 fixed WD values (5e-4, 1e-3) on ResNet20/CIFAR-10 for 20 epochs. Verify training pipeline correctness.
pilot_tasks.pilot_pass_criteria: All 3 runs produce monotonically decreasing training loss. Best WD run has test acc > 50% at epoch 20 (sanity check).
pilot_tasks.fail_action: Debug training pipeline (LR, augmentation, model definition).

pilot_tasks.pilot_description: Run Stagewise-WD and CWD for 20 epochs with WD=5e-4 on ResNet20/CIFAR-10.
pilot_tasks.pilot_pass_criteria: Both produce reasonable loss curves (test acc > 45% at epoch 20)
pilot_tasks.fail_action: Debug CWD implementation against paper description.

pilot_tasks.pilot_description: Run 3 AADWD variants (Conservative, Aggressive, Square) with c=1.0, beta=0.99 on ResNet20/CIFAR-10 for 20 epochs.
pilot_tasks.pilot_pass_criteria: All 3 variants produce non-degenerate lambda_t (not all clipped to min or max for >90% of steps) AND test acc > 45% at epoch 20
pilot_tasks.fail_action: If lambda_t is degenerate: adjust c or clip bounds. If all 3 fail, check alignment computation. If only one variant works, proceed with that variant only.

pilot_tasks.pilot_description: Run best AADWD + Fixed-WD-best on ResNet20/CIFAR-100 and VGG16-BN/CIFAR-10 for 20 epochs.
pilot_tasks.pilot_pass_criteria: AADWD produces non-degenerate lambda_t on both settings AND test acc within 5% of Fixed-WD at epoch 20
pilot_tasks.fail_action: If VGG16 fails: check BN interaction with weight decay. If CIFAR-100 fails: adjust c or lambda bounds.

pilot_tasks.pilot_description: Run AADWD with c in {0.25, 1.0, 2.0} on ResNet20/CIFAR-10 for 20 epochs.
pilot_tasks.pilot_pass_criteria: All c values produce valid training (test acc > 40% at epoch 20, no NaN)
pilot_tasks.fail_action: Narrow c range if extreme values cause instability.

pilot_tasks.pilot_description: Run Random-Dynamic-WD and Equivalent-Cumulative-WD for 20 epochs on ResNet20/CIFAR-10.
pilot_tasks.pilot_pass_criteria: Both produce valid training curves (no NaN, test acc > 40% at epoch 20)

pilot_execution_order.reason: Can run in parallel on separate GPUs. Tier 0 is the primary gate; baseline grid is independent setup validation.
Depends on phase 1 passing. AADWD pilot gates the main experiment; CWD baseline is independent.
All Tier 2 pilots can run in parallel after Tier 1 pilots pass.
